title: Amendment in the 1st Schedule of IDR
description: Amendment in the 1st Schedule of IDR
text: 4063GI/2016 (1) jftLVªh laö Mhö ,yö&33004@99 REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 2055] ubZ fnYyh] 'kqØokj] vxLr 19] 2016@Jko.k 28] 1938 No. 2055] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, AUGUST 19, 2016/SRAVANA 28, 1938 वािण᭔य और उ᳒ ोग मंᮢ ालय (औ᳒ ोिगक नीित और सं वधᭅन िवभाग) अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 11 अग᭭त, 2016 का.आ. 2737(अ) .— कᱶᮤीय सरकार, उ᳒ोग (िवकास और िविनयम) अिधिनयम, 1951 (1951 का 65) कᳱ धारा 29ख कᳱ उप-धारा (1) ᳇ारा ᮧदᱫ शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए, भारत सरकार के त᭜कालीन उ᳒ोग मंᮢालय, (औ᳒ोिगक िवकास िवभाग) कᳱ अिधसूचना सं᭎यांक का.आ. 477(अ) तारीख 25 जुलाई, 1991 का और संशोधन करने के िलए िन᳜िलिखत िनयम बनाते हᱹ, अथाᭅत् :- 2. उᲦ अिधसूचना कᳱ िजन उ᳒ोगᲂ के बारे मᱶ औ᳒ोिगक लाइ सᱶसीकरण अिनवायᭅ है, उनकᳱ सूची से संबंिधत अनुसूची 2 मᱶ, ᮓम सं᭎यांक 3 मᱶ, आईटीसी (एचएस) कोड 22.03, 22.04, 22.05, 22.06 और 22.08 और उससे संबंिधत ᮧिव᳥यᲂ का लोप ᳰकया जाएगा । 3. यह अिधसूचना राजपᮢ मᱶ ᮧकाशन कᳱ तारीख को ᮧवृᱫ होग ी । [फा.सं. 4(7)/1999-आईपी(िज᭨द-3)] रवनीत कौर, संयुᲦ सिचव ᳯट᭡पण : मूल अिधसूचना भारत के राजपᮢ मᱶ का.आ. सं᭎यांक 477 (अ), त ारीख 25 जुलाई, 1991 ᳇ारा ᮧकािशत कᳱ गई थी और अिधसूचना सं᭎यांक का.आ. 998(अ), तारीख 10 अᮧैल, 2015 ᳇ारा अि᭠तम संशोधन ᳰकया गया था । -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (Department of Industrial Policy and Promotion) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 11th August, 2016 S.O. 2737 (E) .— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 29B of the Industries (Development and Regulation) Act, 1951 (65 of 1951), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Industry (Department of Industrial Development) number S.O.477 (E) dated the 25th July, 1991 namely:- 2. In the said notification, in Schedule II relating to the ‘List of Industries in respect of which Industrial Licensing is compulsory’ in serial number 3, ITC(HS) Codes 22.03, 22.04, 22.05, 22.06 and 22.08 and the entries relating thereto shall be omitted. 3. This notification shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. [F.No. 4(7)/1999-IP(Vol-III)] RAVNEET KAUR, Jt. Secy. Note:Ñ The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, vide number S.O. 477(E), dated the 25th July, 1991 and last amended vide Notifications number S.O. 998 (E) dated the 10th April, 2015. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
